# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

This is a private, proprietary project. Access to this repository is granted
solely at the discretion of the author, Rakib Ahsan.

Anyone granted access is expected to:

- Treat all communications respectfully and professionally.
- Keep the contents of this repository confidential.
- Not share, distribute, or reproduce any part of this codebase without explicit
  written permission from the author.
- Report any security vulnerabilities privately (see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md)).

## Unacceptable Behaviour

- Sharing or publishing any part of this codebase without authorisation.
- Any form of harassment, discrimination, or unprofessional conduct.
- Attempting to circumvent access controls or reverse-engineer proprietary logic.

## Enforcement

Violations may result in immediate revocation of repository access and, where
applicable, legal action in accordance with the terms of the [LICENSE](../LICENSE).

## Contact

All conduct concerns should be directed to **Rakib Ahsan** privately.
